## Summary

Describe the simulator, analysis, or documentation change.

## Validation

- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Validation workloads run
- [ ] Workload comparison report regenerated if metrics changed
- [ ] Dashboard report regenerated if analysis artifacts changed
- [ ] Claims checker passes

## Claims safety

- [ ] Does not claim cycle-accurate GPU simulation
- [ ] Does not claim CUDA/Tensor Core execution
- [ ] Does not claim hardware-accurate NVIDIA/A100/H100 prediction
- [ ] Does not claim real MLPerf validation
- [ ] Scope remains workload-level performance modeling
